meta.siteDescription: MyClup helps gyms manage memberships, classes, and bookings. Discover gyms near you and book classes online.

shell.subtitle: One shell for access, conversations, and member actions.

gymsPage.title: Gyms and tenants
gymsPage.subtitle: Provision gyms, branches, and entitlement flags with full audit trails.

usersPage.title: Users and roles
usersPage.subtitle: Platform and support roles; all elevated grants must be audited.

supportPage.title: Support
supportPage.subtitle: Cross-tenant support access only through approved impersonation flows.

moderationPage.title: Moderation
moderationPage.subtitle: Chat and content moderation with tenant isolation preserved.

billingPage.title: Billing oversight
billingPage.subtitle: Platform-level billing health without exposing member PII unnecessarily.

membershipsOversightPage.title: Membership and finance oversight
membershipsOversightPage.subtitle: Cross-tenant read models for subscription health, receivables risk, and plan catalog drift — all queries must stay audited.
membershipsOversightPage.body:
• Aggregate membership instance states per gym without downloading member PII bulk exports.
• Surface finance exceptions (failed installments, overdue receivables) with links into tenant-scoped gym admin views.
• Pair every elevated drill-down with impersonation or support-ticket references per docs/23-platform-audit-elevated-actions.md.
• Locale-aware reporting labels reuse shared analytics taxonomy from packages/analytics.

cmsPage.title: CMS operations
cmsPage.subtitle: Manage global content models and locale variants for platform surfaces.
cmsPage.body:
• Version legal, marketing, and in-product copy per locale with canonical fallbacks.
• Separate platform-owned templates from gym-owned listing content; discovery moderation stays in Epic #35 flows.
• Export and import jobs must emit audit_events with actor, scope, and content hash.
• Coordinate rollout with Localization operations — no empty-string fallbacks in production surfaces.

localesPage.title: Localization operations
localesPage.subtitle: Coordinate default locales, fallbacks, and translation coverage.

auditPage.title: Audit log
auditPage.subtitle: Read-only view over audit_events for elevated and cross-tenant actions.

about.title: About MyClup
about.subtitle: We help gyms run memberships, classes, and conversations in one multilingual platform.
about.body: MyClup connects members, staff, and discovery experiences with tenant-safe data, Supabase-backed chat, and locale-first delivery.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Share your gym name and email — we respond with next steps for your locale.

discoveryWeb.body: Listings are tenant-owned and locale-aware. Reviews, trial requests, and lead routing will flow through audited BFF endpoints with explicit consent and SEO-safe metadata per locale.
